title: Multiple Search Queries For Status

posts.author: Deeps (Deeps)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello all,

I have different statuses on my boards, for example, “to do”, “in progress”, “resolved” etc.

When I do a quick search, can I search through all boards and find either, both “to do” and “in progress” or all items that are not “resolved”?

The search seems really basic unless I missed something.

Thanks in advanced.

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey there!

Have you tried using Search Everything for this? Search Everything pulls results from across your entire account and you can set filters for your results.

Check it out here.

Let me know if this answers your question!
